name: CAMEL, SILVER
description: Rare camels with soft, silvery hair and affable dispositions.
statblock: AC 10, HP 13, ATK 1 hoof +3 (1d6) or 1 spit (near) +0 (1d4), MV double near, S +3, D +0, C +4, I -2, W +1, Ch +0, AL N, LV 2

name: CANYON APE
description: Clawed apes with sandy, matted hair and reflective eyes. Carnivorous ambush hunters.
statblock: AC 13, HP 29, ATK 3 rend +6 (2d6), MV near (climb), S +4, D +3, C +2, I -1, W +1, Ch -1, AL N, LV 6

abilities.name: Ambush
abilities.description: Deals double damage against surprised foes.

abilities.name: Stalk
abilities.description: ADV on DEX checks while in mountains and canyons.

name: DONKEY
description: Stocky, long-eared cousins of horses that are capable haulers.
statblock: AC 10, HP 6, ATK 1 hoof +3 (1d4), MV near, S +3, D +0, C +2, I -2, W +1, Ch -2, AL N, LV 1

name: DUNEFIEND
description: Demons that appear as claylike elves with jagged mouths and no other facial features.
statblock: AC 14, HP 20, ATK 2 tear +4 (1d8) or 1 howl, MV near, S +3, D +4, C +2, I +0, W +1, Ch +0, AL C, LV 4

abilities.name: Howl
abilities.description: Resting creatures who hear in far DC 12 CHA or no benefit from rest (immune 1 day if pass).

name: DUST DEVIL
statblock: AC 16, HP 36, ATK 2 lacerate +5 (2d8), MV double near, S +4, D +4, C +0, I -2, W +0, Ch -2, AL C, LV 8

abilities.name: Fling
abilities.description: In place of attacks, all within close DC 15 DEX or flung 1d100 feet in random direction.

name: HERO, GLADIATOR
description: High-ranked gladiators who have attained widespread fame.
statblock: AC 16 (chainmail + shield), HP 25, ATK 3 bastard sword +5 (1d8) or 1 spear (close/near) +5 (1d6), MV near, S +3, D +1, C +3, I +0, W +1, Ch +1, AL N, LV 5

name: HORSE, WAR
description: Muscular destriers trained to carry warriors into combat.
statblock: AC 11, HP 15, ATK 1 hooves +4 (1d6), MV double near, S +3, D +1, C +2, I -3, W +1, Ch -1, AL N, LV 3

name: MIRAGE
description: Sinister illusions made manifest by fever dreams and futile hope.
statblock: AC 6, HP 32, ATK 1 leech, MV near, S -4, D -4, C -4, I +2, W +1, Ch +4, AL C, LV 8

abilities.name: Delude
abilities.description: Has the illusory look and feel of what its viewers expect or want it to be (creature or small location). DC 18 INT to notice it's an illusion.

abilities.name: Leech
abilities.description: One target in near, DC 18 CHA or 3d6 damage. Mirage creates plausible illusion to explain the injury.

name: RAS-GODAI
description: Black-garbed assassins in demon masks. They move swiftly in bursts of smoke.
statblock: AC 13 (leather), HP 13, ATK 1 razor chain (near) +4 (1d6), MV near (teleport), S +1, D +2, C +0, I +0, W +1, Ch +0, AL C, LV 3

abilities.name: Assassinate
abilities.description: Deals double damage against surprised foes.

name: ROOKIE, PIT-FIGHTER
statblock: AC 14 (leather + shield), HP 5, ATK 1 shortsword +1 (1d6) or 1 javelin (close/far) +1 (1d4), MV near, S +1, D +1, C +1, I +0, W +0, Ch +0, AL N, LV 1

name: SCRAG
description: Tan monitor lizards as large as cows. They scamper low to the ground on wall-clinging feet.
statblock: AC 12, HP 11, ATK 1 claw +2 (1d6), MV near (climb), S +2, D +2, C +2, I -2, W +1, Ch -3, AL N, LV 2

name: SCRAG, WAR
description: Oversized scrag lizards trained to be unflinching in combat.
statblock: AC 12, HP 15, ATK 1 claw +3 (1d6), MV near (climb), S +3, D +2, C +2, I -2, W +1, Ch -3, AL N, LV 3

name: SIRUUL
description: Nomadic elves who glide as easily through the scorching desert as the winds.
statblock: AC 14 (leather), HP 9, ATK 1 scimitar +3 (1d6) or 1 longbow (far) +3 (1d8), MV double near (mount), S +0, D +3, C +0, I +1, W +1, Ch +1, AL N, LV 2

abilities.name: Desert Born
abilities.description: ADV on DEX checks while in the wild desert.

abilities.name: Mount
abilities.description: Loyal silver camel that refuses any other rider.

name: THE SCOURGE
description: The Scourge writhes and screams in constant pain. Its brass and lapis scales are choked with a sickly, green patina. Blue lightning snaps and coils in the air around it, and thunderclouds follow wherever it flies, but no rain falls from the tormented skies.
statblock: AC 17, HP 84, ATK 3 rend +10 (2d10) or lightning breath, MV double near (fly), S +6, D +3, C +3, I +4, W +4, Ch +5, AL C, LV 18

abilities.name: Corruption
abilities.description: Swallowed the Shield of the Witch-King to end an ancient war; the evil spirit inside tortures and corrupts the dragon.

abilities.name: Lightning Breath
abilities.description: A straight line (5' wide) extending double near from dragon. DC 15 DEX or 5d8 damage (DISADV on check if wearing metal armor).

abilities.name: Mirage
abilities.description: 1/day, in place of attacks. Create 3 illusory duplicates that disappear when hit. Determine randomly what an attack hits.
